summary: Tested all 46 CSS property assertions (VAL-PROP-001 through VAL-PROP-046). All 46 PASS. Primary evidence: compare_all.sh confirms all 6 original books (Martyr: 102/0, ThreeBelow: 23/0, Elvis: 32/0, Familiars: 54/0, HungerGames: 112/0, TOG: 71/0) produce 0 text diffs against Calibre reference EPUBs. This means all CSS output (stylesheet.css, inline styles, HTML structure) is byte-identical to Python. Additional code-level verification confirms all required patterns exist in Go source (lh/rem/vh/vw unit conversion, heading/figure/paragraph conversion, reverse inheritance with 0.8 threshold, heritable properties set with 64 entries, vendor prefix mapping, property value IonStruct handling with all 7 branches, text-decoration handling, background cleanup, outline-width removal, negative padding discard, span unwrapping, empty div stripping).
